reviews.comment:
Cargamos gasolina aqui antes de seguir.
Al frente hay un bar que pareciera ser que  esta cerrado siempre, pero esta abierto y tienen comida artesanal riquisima y barata.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with gas here before continuing.
There's a bar across the street that looks like it's always closed, but it's open and they have delicious and inexpensive homemade food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdEkyNi13RRAB
